storeText.title: Scriptures for Every Situation
storeText.shortDescription: Bible, devotions, prayer, study, quizzes, ministry tools, and AI Scripture guidance.
storeText.fullDescription: Scriptures for Every Situation is a Christian growth platform with Bible reading, 360-day devotions, memory verses, Bible quizzes, AI study tools, sermon builder, family devotions, church and ministry tools, Bible maps, timelines, and prayer journaling.
